summary: Game app with a home screen that lists playable games as thumbnails; selecting a thumbnail starts the game immediately.
known_issues: Game does not currently appear on the home screen as a playable option.

existing_features.title: Update the frontend Home page experience so the playable games always appear as thumbnail cards and selecting a card navigates to `/games/$gameId` to start the game immediately.

new_feature_requests.summary: Show the game on the home screen as a thumbnail tile; tapping it starts the game immediately.

Ensure the backend game catalog is automatically seeded so that the predefined playable games exist and are returned by `getAllGames()`, making them appear on the Home page as selectable thumbnail cards.
